element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Standard run-and-gun combat with upgradeable blaster variants
Moving conveyor belts and jumping sequences introduce spatial timing

element_introduction_order.first_appears: After obtaining from Obi-Wan Kenobi (early-mid game)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Melee alternative to ranged blaster, changes combat approach
Breaks platforming loop with driving mechanics
Death Star trench run finale with aerial combat
Character roster variation with different ability profiles
Character roster variation with Wookiee-specific mechanics
Enhanced blaster variants discovered during progression

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Action-driven with narrative punctuation; vehicle segments provide pacing relief; escalates toward climactic boss encounters

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces basic platforming and blaster combat with manageable enemy density; Tatooine stages establish core mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increases enemy variety and platforming complexity; introduces character switching and vehicle segments to vary challenge type
difficulty_curve.late_game: Intensifies combat encounters; Death Star stages feature elevated boss difficulty and trench run precision requirements
notable_spikes: Jawa Sandcrawler conveyor belt sequence (early mechanical test)
X-Wing Death Star trench run (skill-based finale)

notable_level_patterns.description: Most levels blend horizontal movement with jumping puzzles and enemy encounters; standard blaster and upgrades define baseline challenge
Luke, Han Solo, and Chewbacca have distinct ability profiles; later stages allow player to select which character to control for different playstyles
Breaks platforming loop with landspeeder driving and X-wing piloting; shifts challenge from platforming to vehicle handling and dodging
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Landspeeder escape sequence, X-Wing Death Star run

notable_level_patterns.description: Major story beats culminate in boss fights; final confrontation with Darth Vader provides climactic closure aligned with film narrative
Cutscenes between levels advance abbreviated retelling of A New Hope; plot milestones (acquiring lightsaber, character unlocks) tied to level progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Obi-Wan encounter grants lightsaber; character unlocks tied to story beats

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Super Star Wars SNES debug/development info)
wikipedia - Super Star Wars (gameplay mechanics, level/character descriptions, development notes)
